text.content: [Danvers, MA, January 15th, 2025]

rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, MA, January 15th, 2025]

text.content: – MAXAM Tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing and distribution, is excited to debut its new rubber tracks line for construction equipment, marking a significant expansion of its product portfolio. The initial release features three versatile models—

rich_text.plain_text: – MAXAM Tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing and distribution, is excited to debut its new rubber tracks line for construction equipment, marking a significant expansion of its product portfolio. The initial release features three versatile models—

text.content: Building on a Legacy of Excellence

rich_text.plain_text: Building on a Legacy of Excellence

text.content: “We are thrilled to introduce our new rubber tracks line to the market,” said Troy Kline, President of MAXAM Tire North America. “This launch is a natural extension of our proven success in the off-the-road tire industry. The MT130, MT150, and MT170 tracks are just the beginning; we are committed to continuous innovation and additional product development to meet the evolving needs of our customers.”

rich_text.plain_text: “We are thrilled to introduce our new rubber tracks line to the market,” said Troy Kline, President of MAXAM Tire North America. “This launch is a natural extension of our proven success in the off-the-road tire industry. The MT130, MT150, and MT170 tracks are just the beginning; we are committed to continuous innovation and additional product development to meet the evolving needs of our customers.”

text.content: Introducing the MT Series Rubber Tracks

rich_text.plain_text: Introducing the MT Series Rubber Tracks

text.content: A versatile rubber track featuring an H-Lug tread pattern, the MT130 strikes the perfect balance between traction and resistance to cuts and wear. Ideal for multiple surface conditions, it is available in both narrow and wide widths to suit different working environments.

rich_text.plain_text: A versatile rubber track featuring an H-Lug tread pattern, the MT130 strikes the perfect balance between traction and resistance to cuts and wear. Ideal for multiple surface conditions, it is available in both narrow and wide widths to suit different working environments.

text.content: Specializing in wet surfaces, the MT150 boasts a Z-Lug, self-cleaning stepped tread pattern for excellent traction while maintaining maximum cut and wear resistance. Available in narrow and wide widths, it is suitable for various working environments.

rich_text.plain_text: Specializing in wet surfaces, the MT150 boasts a Z-Lug, self-cleaning stepped tread pattern for excellent traction while maintaining maximum cut and wear resistance. Available in narrow and wide widths, it is suitable for various working environments.

text.content: MT170 Mini-excavator:

rich_text.plain_text: MT170 Mini-excavator:

text.content: The MT170 mini-excavator is an excellent general-purpose solution with a versatile tread pattern, adaptable to various terrains. Engineered for durability with increased net to gross, it also features a cut and tear-resistant compound and a heavy-duty carcass for maximum stability.

rich_text.plain_text: The MT170 mini-excavator is an excellent general-purpose solution with a versatile tread pattern, adaptable to various terrains. Engineered for durability with increased net to gross, it also features a cut and tear-resistant compound and a heavy-duty carcass for maximum stability.

text.content: Enhanced Support with the MAXAM Mobile App

rich_text.plain_text: Enhanced Support with the MAXAM Mobile App

text.content: MAXAM Tire has also released two new rubber track features on the

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire has also released two new rubber track features on the

text.content: MAXAM Mobile App

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Mobile App

text.content:
to better assist customers: Track Fitment Guide and Ground Pressure Calculator.  These features will enable customers to find the right track for their equipment, and to compare different track estimated ground pressures. Users can download the app by searching “MAXAM Mobile” in their app store to access the rubber track features and explore other resources and tools.

For media inquiries, please contact: marketing@maxamtirena.com
